examples: I just want a good reliable car, nothing flashy.

The flashy brochures and pamphlets left by the sales reps are often followed up with meals at expensive restaurants, meetings in warm and sunny places, and an inundation of promotional gadgets.
The popular chacarera, a lively partner dance, incorporates flashy zapateo (quick stomps of the feet).
It's not about flashy starchitect bling, high-tech tricks, minimalist sensory deprivation or narcissistic egos.
